name: Swiss Style Green Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly sauté the onions in 4 tbsp of margarine, then stir in flour, sugar, salt, and white pepper.
2. Blend well. Stir in sour cream. Cook until thick, stirring occasionally.
3. Drain the green beans and add to the sour cream mixture.
4. Pour into a buttered casserole.
5. Top with Swiss cheese.
6. Melt remaining 3 tbsp margarine, then stir in corn flakes.
7. Spread over the top of the cheese.
8. Bake at 350°F for 30-40 minutes.
This may be prepared in advance and refrigerated, but it is better if you prepare the corn flake mixture when ready to bake the dish.
